channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Webb telescope reveals strange atmosphere on lava planet
item.description: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope has uncovered new details about the scorching lava planet 55 Cancri e, where temperatures can melt rock.

item.title: Quantum breakthrough links light and magnetism in thin materials
item.description: A new review highlights progress in atomically thin quantum materials where light and magnetism interact in unprecedented ways.

item.title: Common constipation drug may help clear depression brain fog
item.description: An existing constipation drug may have an unexpected new use: helping clear the brain fog that often lingers after depression. In a small clinical trial...

item.title: Podcast: New security and communications materials
item.description: Nicholas Kotov discusses complex materials and the development of new fused-silk materials with applications in security and communications.
